start_date_project.description: Tanggal dimulainya proyek dalam UTC timestamp

end_date_project.description: Tanggal berakhirnya proyek dalam UTC timestamp

start_date_project_second.description: Tanggal dimulainya proyek2 dalam UTC timestamp

end_date_project_second.description: Tanggal berakhirnya proyek2 dalam UTC timestamp

discount_rate_start_year.description: The year the discount rate starts

inflation_rate_applied_to.description: The inflation rate is applied to Capex=0, Opex=1, CapexOpex=2 and None=3

delayAccMode.description: If true, the project start date will be based on the start_date_project + delayAccYear

delayAccYear.description: The number of years to delay the project start date, impacting to cost and lifting

useCOS.description: If true, the Cost of Sales (COS) will be used in the project

lbtUseCalc.description: If true, the LBT Cost will be used in the project
